name: video-learner
description: YouTube Video Pipeline - Download, Transcript & Summary

scripts.test:reset-scope: node tests/apply-reset-scope.test.js && node tests/reset-scope-http.test.js && node tests/reset-scope-all-steps-http.test.js && node tests/service-client-reset-scope-all-steps.test.js
scripts.test:orchestrator:unit: node tests/step-artifacts.test.js && node tests/orchestrator-progress-logging.test.js && npm run test:schedule && npm run test:reset-scope
scripts.test:agent:core: npm run test:orchestrator:unit && npm run test:runstep-a-layer && npm run test:agent && npm run test:agent:sqlite
scripts.test:gui: npm run test:gui:main && npm run test:gui:preload && npm run test:gui:client:http && npm run test:gui:client:sse && npm run test:gui:client:reset-scope && npm run test:gui:state
scripts.test:cli: node tests/cli-server-token.test.js && node tests/cli-server.test.js && node tests/cli-server-spawn.test.js && node tests/cli-client.test.js && node tests/cli-format.test.js && node tests/cli-commands.test.js && node tests/cli-run.test.js && node tests/cli-subcommands.test.js
